expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the case focus and discusses it: result.md includes "Case focus: Canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios" and reiterates contract rules: "Group the Phase 4a draft into canonical top-layer taxonomy without merging away scenario granularity" plus "Anti-compression" / "Preserve scenario nodes". It also assesses that this focus is "Not verifiable with current evidence."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4b
expectations.evidence: The output is framed as a Phase 4b phase-contract check and aligns to Phase 4b requirements: it states "Primary phase under test: Phase 4b" and quotes Phase 4b contract inputs/outputs and canonical categories. It evaluates Phase 4b compliance and concludes it cannot be demonstrated due to missing Phase 4a/4b artifacts (e.g., "Cannot be demonstrated from provided evidence" because "No Phase 4a/4b plan drafts are present").
